◆ MR_BMap_MR_FaceId_size_t_AssignFromAnother()

MRC_API MR_BMap_MR_FaceId_size_t * MR_BMap_MR_FaceId_size_t_AssignFromAnother ( MR_BMap_MR_FaceId_size_t * _this,
MR_PassBy _other_pass_by,
MR_BMap_MR_FaceId_size_t * _other )

Generated from method MR::BMap<MR::FaceId, size_t>::operator=. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The reference to things referred to by the parameter _other (if any) might be preserved in this object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it. When this function is called, this object will drop any object references it held previously.

◆ MR_BMap_MR_FaceId_size_t_ConstructFrom()

MRC_API MR_BMap_MR_FaceId_size_t * MR_BMap_MR_FaceId_size_t_ConstructFrom ( MR_PassBy b_pass_by,
MR_Buffer_MR_FaceId * b,
size_t tsize )

Constructs MR::BMap<MR::FaceId, size_t> elementwise. The reference to the parameter b might be preserved in the constructed object. The reference to the parameter tsize might be preserved in the constructed object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_BMap_MR_FaceId_size_t_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it. When this function is called, this object will drop any object references it held previously.

Returns a pointer to a member variable of class MR::ZeroOnMove<size_t> named val. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it. The reference to this object might be preserved as the return value.

◆ MR_ZeroOnMove_size_t_GetMutable_val()

MRC_API size_t * MR_ZeroOnMove_size_t_GetMutable_val ( MR_ZeroOnMove_size_t * _this)

Returns a mutable pointer to a member variable of class MR::ZeroOnMove<size_t> named val. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it. The reference to this object might be preserved as the return value.

◆ MR_ZeroOnMove_size_t_OffsetMutablePtr()

MRC_API MR_ZeroOnMove_size_t * MR_ZeroOnMove_size_t_OffsetMutablePtr ( MR_ZeroOnMove_size_t * ptr,
ptrdiff_t i )

Offsets a pointer to an array element by i positions (not bytes). Use only if you're certain that the pointer points to an array element. The reference to the parameter ptr might be preserved in the return value.

◆ MR_ZeroOnMove_size_t_OffsetPtr()

MRC_API const MR_ZeroOnMove_size_t * MR_ZeroOnMove_size_t_OffsetPtr ( const MR_ZeroOnMove_size_t * ptr,
ptrdiff_t i )

Offsets a pointer to an array element by i positions (not bytes). Use only if you're certain that the pointer points to an array element. The reference to the parameter ptr might be preserved in the return value.

◆ MR_ZeroOnMove_size_t_Set_val()

MRC_API void MR_ZeroOnMove_size_t_Set_val ( MR_ZeroOnMove_size_t * _this,
size_t value )

Modifies a member variable of class MR::ZeroOnMove<size_t> named val. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The reference to the parameter value might be preserved in this object in element val. When this function is called, this object will drop object references it held previously in val.
